scripts.buildLinuxX86: pnpm run bundle && node --experimental-sea-config sea-config.json && cp $(command -v node) build/email-cli-linux-x86 && pnpx postject build/email-cli-linux-x86 NODE_SEA_BLOB sea-prep.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2 && rimraf sea-prep.blob
scripts.buildLinuxArm64: pnpm run bundle && node --experimental-sea-config sea-config.json && cp node_versions/node-v24.17.0-linux-arm64/bin/node build/email-cli-linux-arm64 && pnpx postject build/email-cli-linux-arm64 NODE_SEA_BLOB sea-prep.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2 && rimraf sea-prep.blob
scripts.buildAll: pnpm run buildLinuxX86 && pnpm run buildLinuxArm64
